tasting_rooms.name: Rákóczi Pince és Udvarház
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided cellar visit with tasting from HUF 3500; Knight's Hall group tastings available
tasting_rooms.description: 15th-century cellar complex on Tokaj's main square, with a Knight's Hall measuring 28 m long and 5 m high. Owned by Tokaj-Hétszőlő Organic Vineyard; tastings cover Aszú, Furmint, and Hárslevelű in English and Hungarian.

tasting_rooms.name: Holdvölgy Pincészet Tasting Cellar
tasting_rooms.pricing: Treasure Hunt with 6 wines; Aszú vertical tasting 6 vintages; tickets available online
tasting_rooms.description: One of the longest cellar systems in the region, sections dating to the 16th century. Multiple tasting formats including a vertical Aszú tasting and a Treasure Hunt cellar exploration; winner of Best Cellar Visit in Hungary two consecutive years.

tasting_rooms.name: Royal Tokaji Cellar and Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment; tastings typically EUR 20-40 per person covering dry to Aszú range
tasting_rooms.description: State-of-the-art winery designed by Csaba Bodonyi, opening 2010, with 13th-century cellars beneath. Tasting programmes cover single-vineyard Furmint and Aszú from the estate's first- and second-growth plots: Mézes Mály, Nyulászó, Betsek, among others.

tasting_rooms.name: Disznókő Winery Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Classic flight, Eszencia tasting, vertical Aszú tasting; book via borbutik@disznoko.hu
tasting_rooms.description: Guided tour of terraced UNESCO-listed vineyards, modern winery, and historic cellars, followed by a seated tasting in the historic cellar. Wine shop open May through October.

tasting_rooms.name: Tokaj Oremus Tasting Cellar
tasting_rooms.address: Arany János utca, Hrsz. 31/3, 3934 Tolcsva, Hungary
tasting_rooms.pricing: EUR 20 per person (minors EUR 5); Mandolás + Late Harvest + Aszú tasting
tasting_rooms.description: Vega Sicilia's Tokaj property, with 115 ha of first-growth vineyards and centuries-old underground cellars. Tasting covers three wines from dry Furmint to Aszú, with cellar and production tour; Monday to Sunday in summer.

verified.address_quoted: Tolcsva Arany János u hrsz. 31/3, 3934 Hungary

tasting_rooms.name: Demeter Zoltán Vinoteka
tasting_rooms.pricing: Seated tasting of 5 wines with snacks; Thu-Sun from 15:00
tasting_rooms.description: Brand winebar and vinothek of Demeter Zoltán Pincészet in Tokaj old town, opened 2025. Anett Demeter leads afternoon tastings paired with freshly baked bread and local charcuterie; portfolio covers dry Furmint to Aszú.

tasting_rooms.name: Füleky Pincészet Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar visit with tasting; dinner menus by arrangement
tasting_rooms.description: 18th-century Baroque Füleky mansion next to the late-Gothic church in Bodrogkeresztúr, with a modern winery voted Industrial Building of the Year 2011 by ArchDaily. Tastings in the guesthouse; 25 ha in leading Tokaj vineyards.

tasting_rooms.name: Béres Vineyards and Winery Visitor Centre
tasting_rooms.pricing: Wine tastings included in estate visit; outdoor event space
tasting_rooms.description: Contemporary winery complex in the village of Erdőbénye designed by architect Anthony Gall, completed 2006. The courtyard's circular skylight offers insight into winemaking; diverse tasting programmes including late-harvest and Aszú.

tasting_rooms.name: Götz Pincészet Cellar Visit
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar visit with tasting; groups by appointment; Gombos-hegyi UNESCO cellar row included
tasting_rooms.description: Family winery in the Swabian village of Hercegkút, 3 km from Sárospatak. Visits include the bottling facility then transport to the Gombos-hegyi cellar row, a UNESCO World Heritage site dug into rhyolite-tufa, for tasting.

tasting_rooms.name: Tokajicum Borház Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar visits and structured tastings; contact winery for current schedule
tasting_rooms.description: Mediterranean-style wine house in Tarcal founded 2002, farming nearly 20 ha on the Tarcal-Mád border. Mineral Furmint and Hárslevelű flights from single-vineyard selections to late-harvest dessert wines.

tasting_rooms.name: Mad Wine Tasting and Cellar Visit
tasting_rooms.pricing: Vineyard walk and cellar tasting; book via mad-wine.com
tasting_rooms.description: Smallholder collective based in Mád, working with local farming families on 20 ha of volcanic soil. Guided vineyard walk followed by cellar visit focusing on Furmint and Hárslevelű; chemical-free viticulture highlighted.

tasting_rooms.name: Szepsy Winery Cellar Visit
tasting_rooms.pricing: By appointment only; single-vineyard tasting of dry Furmint and Aszú
tasting_rooms.description: The Szepsy family's historic cellars in Mád, with winemaking roots to the 16th century and the origins of Aszú production. Appointment-only visits covering the vineyards, historic cellar, and a seated tasting of single-vineyard cuvées.

tasting_rooms.name: Tokaj-Hétszőlő Wine Shop and Tasting Bar
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in wine shop and tasting bar; individual glass pours and bottles to buy
tasting_rooms.description: Tokaj-Hétszőlő's retail shop in Tokaj town centre, above the Rákóczi cellars. Sells estate wines plus local balsam vinegar and grape-seed oil; tasting bar for walk-in glass pours; open Monday to Sunday.

tasting_rooms.name: Percze Élményközpont Mád
tasting_rooms.pricing: Restaurant dining with Szepsy wine list; vineyard experience modes on request
tasting_rooms.description: Wine experience centre and restaurant in Mád with full-height windows overlooking the village and vineyards. Comprehensive Szepsy wine list and modern Hungarian cuisine; various modes of exploring the estate's vineyards available.

tasting_rooms.name: Sauska Tokaj Bar
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in bar with Sauska sparkling and still wines by the glass; bar snacks
tasting_rooms.description: Ground-floor wine bar in the striking Sauska Tokaj winery opened 2024, designed with panoramic terraces over the vineyards. Sauska sparkling and still wines by the glass; connects to Padi restaurant upstairs.
